titleStmt.title: SII 27.80: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 80. (A.R. No. 238 of 1931-32.) ATRĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab standing to the right of Babbare-sthāna.
This is dated Śaka 13[27] (current), Tāraṇa, Vaiśākha [su. 8], Thursday corresponding to 1404 A.D., April 17, Thursday, f.d.t. ·07.

It registers a gift of land to god Nārāyaṇadēva which was under the management of the Hattu-kēri of Bārakūru, by an individual, when an officer (name lost) elder brother of mahāpradhāna Basavaṇṇa was governing Bārakūru-rājya. The king is stated to have been ruling from Dōrasamudra. The record is badly damaged and details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī gaṇādhipataE namaḥ
. svastiśrī ja
yābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1327 neya vartamāna tāraṇa saṁva
tsarada vayiśākha śu 8 guruvāradaṁdu śrī manmahārājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra harihara mahārāyaru dōrasamudrane
le bīḍi nōḷirddu duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipālaneyanū māḍi sukhasaṁ
kathā vinōdadiṁ diṁ rājya paripālisuttaṁ viralu tatpā
da padmōpajīvitarappa śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ basavaṁṇagaḷa Aṁṇa ma
dēvagaḷu bārakūra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalu bārakūra hattu
kērigaḷa stānada śrīnārāyaṇadēvarige Eraḍu kōla baḷiya
Oḷage Oṁdu kōla baḷige mukhyarāda ḷeya baḷiya Aṁṇā
yavara Aḷiyaṁdiru kōṭiseṭṭi Ajīvi
mūvaru sahitavāgi tāu biṭada brahmadāya
da mūlada bāḷu brā paḷiya Oḷagaṇa baḷadabāḷina catussī
meya vivara muṁnavara baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu harikaḍe
yiṁdaṁ baḍagalu muṁnavara baḷiyavara bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu
ya baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīme Oḷa
guḷaṁ thā bāḷina Oḷage tamage dalū saṁdu bahaṁthā kā dīpa
māleya kaṁbhasahita sarvvamāṁnyavāgi biṭṭu śrī nārāyaṇa dēvarige
tapaḍige Ācaṁdrārkka sthāyiyāgi varuṣaṁprati naḍuva
lekada mūḍe 30 Akṣarādalū mūvattu mūḍe The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 27.80 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
